title: Mantis Telegram Desktop Proof
summary: Mantis could not capture native Telegram Desktop before/after GIF evidence because the desktop/Telegram credential infrastructure was unavailable during this run.

baseline.expected: baseline native Telegram Desktop proof captured
baseline.error: AWS desktop provisioning failed; Hetzner retry could not acquire a telegram-user credential.

candidate.expected: candidate native Telegram Desktop proof captured
candidate.error: Candidate session was not run because no telegram-user credential was available after baseline setup retries.

artifacts.label: Mantis Telegram Desktop proof blocker report
